import io
import string

data ParseResult
  value: Int
  next: Int
end

fn is_ws(_ c: Int) -> Bool
  c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut j = i
  mut done = false
  while j < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, j)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        j = j + 1
      else
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  j
end

fn parse_next(_ s: String, _ start: Int) -> ParseResult
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut j = skip_ws(s, start)
  mut tok = ""
  mut done = false
  while j < n and not done
    match string.byte_at(s, j)
    when Some(c)
      if is_ws(c)
        done = true
      else
        tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
        j = j + 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  ParseResult(value: v, next: j)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let r1 = parse_next(input, 0)
  let r2 = parse_next(input, r1.next)
  let r3 = parse_next(input, r2.next)
  let a = r1.value
  let b = r2.value
  let s = r3.value

  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < b
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
